description: Talk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better Sports bag you can find than this one from nike. Neatly designed with lots of organizer space, this bag makes for a great everyday wear to school or college.Height: 17.5" Width: 12" Depth: 9" Capacity: 27 litres Made of polyester and nylon, with a polyester and nylon lining for durability and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bag One main copiously spaced zippered compartment One front zippered compartment with multiple pouches One front protected media pocket One mesh organizer on the side to hold a sipper Water resistant tarpaulin bottom Synthetic haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable padded handles and padded back for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuries Mesh back for ventilation nike branding between the two zippered compartments, with swoosh on the front and embroidered swoosh on right handle for style Care Hand washClean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not dry clean or machine washDo not bleach Do not tumble dryDo not wringLine dry Do not iron
